summary: Iteration 242 - Dashboard Cantiere Multilivello Testing Complete. All backend APIs (17/17 tests passed) and frontend UI components working correctly. The dashboard displays executive overview with semaphore indicators, global summary KPIs, filter buttons, and drill-down functionality with 4 readiness levels.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/dashboard/cantiere-multilivello: Correctly aggregates data from 9 MongoDB collections (commesse, obblighi_commessa, cantieri_sicurezza, rami_normativi, emissioni_documentali, pacchetti_documentali, analisi_committenza, pacchetti_committenza)
Semaphore logic correctly implemented: rosso when bloccanti > 0, giallo when warnings > 0 or aperti > 3, verde otherwise
Global summary counts (totale, verdi, gialli, rossi, bloccanti_totali, aperti_totali) correctly match individual commessa data
DashboardCantierePage.js: Properly renders GlobalSummary with 6 KPI cards, filter buttons, and CommessaCard components
CommessaCard component correctly shows semaphore dot, numero, stato badge, normativa badge, value, days_left, and aperti count
Drill-down functionality works with 4 readiness mini-cards (Obblighi, Rami Normativi, POS Sicurezza, Pacchetti Doc.)
Collapsible sections (Blockers Critici, Obblighi per Fonte, Rami Normativi, Sicurezza/POS, Pacchetti Documentali, Verifica Committenza) work correctly
DashboardLayout.js: Sidebar has 'Dashboard Cantiere' link at path /cruscotto-cantiere with correct data-testid
App.js: Route /cruscotto-cantiere correctly maps to DashboardCantierePage component

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All UI components render correctly, navigation works, drill-down functional)

seed_data_creation: Used existing user data with session_token K6fH_AIOSlUNVh8nGj5yAOjYtEyW-Ifsc4X5SFRVQYQ (user_97c773827822) which has 12 active commesse
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard Cantiere Multilivello is fully functional. User has 12 active commesse with 9 verdi, 3 gialli, 0 rossi. Global summary shows 0 bloccanti and 8 aperti. Drill-down shows 4 readiness levels and collapsible sections. Navigation to Hub Commessa works via 'Apri Hub Commessa' button.

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/dashboard/cantiere-multilivello: PASSED - Returns correct structure with commesse array and global_summary
api_endpoints_tested.Response structure validation: PASSED - Each commessa has semaforo, obblighi, rami, rami_summary, pos, pacchetti, pacchetti_summary, committenza_summary, top_blockers
api_endpoints_tested.Semaphore logic (giallo): PASSED - giallo when warnings > 0 or aperti > 3
api_endpoints_tested.Global summary counts: PASSED - totale, verdi, gialli, rossi, bloccanti_totali, aperti_totali match individual commessa data
api_endpoints_tested.Obblighi structure: PASSED - Contains totale, bloccanti, aperti, chiusi, da_verificare, warnings, by_source, by_severity
api_endpoints_tested.Rami summary structure: PASSED - Contains totale, pronti, emissioni_totali, emissioni_pronte
api_endpoints_tested.Pacchetti summary structure: PASSED - Contains totale, completi, missing_totali, expired_totali
api_endpoints_tested.Committenza summary structure: PASSED - Contains pacchetti, analisi_totali, analisi_approvate, analisi_pending, obblighi_estratti, anomalie_totali, mismatch_totali
api_endpoints_tested.Top blockers structure: PASSED - List with title, source_module fields
api_endpoints_tested.POS structure: PASSED - Contains cantiere_id, nome, gate_pos_ready, campi_mancanti, blockers when present
api_endpoints_tested.Data integrity - rami: PASSED - Rami list length matches rami_summary.totale
api_endpoints_tested.Data integrity - pacchetti: PASSED - Pacchetti list length matches pacchetti_summary.totale

frontend_components_tested.GlobalSummary: PASSED - Shows 6 KPI cards (Commesse Attive, Verdi, Gialli, Rossi, Bloccanti, Aperti)
frontend_components_tested.Filter buttons: PASSED - Tutte, Critiche, Attenzione, OK buttons visible and clickable
frontend_components_tested.CommessaCard: PASSED - Shows semaphore dot, numero, stato badge, normativa badge, value, days_left
frontend_components_tested.Drill-down expand: PASSED - Clicking card expands to show 4 readiness mini-cards
frontend_components_tested.Readiness mini-cards: PASSED - Obblighi, Rami Normativi, POS Sicurezza, Pacchetti Doc. visible
frontend_components_tested.Collapsible sections: PASSED - Obblighi per Fonte section expands/collapses
frontend_components_tested.Sidebar navigation: PASSED - Dashboard Cantiere link navigates to /cruscotto-cantiere

features_verified.Step A - Executive overview: Global summary with 6 KPIs, semaphore indicators per commessa
features_verified.Step B - Drill-down Level 1 (Commessa): 4 readiness mini-cards, top blockers, obblighi per fonte
features_verified.Step B - Drill-down Level 2 (Rami Normat: Rami list with stato, emissioni progress
features_verified.Step B - Drill-down Level 3 (Sicurezza/P: POS gate status, campi mancanti, blockers
features_verified.Filter functionality: Filters by semaphore color (tutti, rosso, giallo, verde)
features_verified.Navigation: Sidebar link and Hub Commessa button work correctly
features_verified.Italian language: All labels in Italian (Commesse Attive, Verdi, Gialli, Rossi, Bloccanti, Aperti, etc.)
